text: Dr. Vincent Daniel is a thoracic oncologist, one of just several hundred surgeons across the country routinely performing this type of surgery.

Now with the robotic technology, we're able to go in between the rib spaces with very small instruments, many of which measure less than one inch in size, and actually remove the entire lung cancer as well as the associated surrounding lung and lymph nodes using this technique.
There are also fewer complications with this robotic procedure and much quicker recovery time.
